title: sideritis hyssopifolia subsp. alpina
intro: Sideritis hyssopifolia subsp. alpina, also known as Alpine Ironwort, is a plant species belonging to the genus Sideritis, which is a group of flowering plants in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Sideritis hyssopifolia subsp. alpina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Sideritis hyssopifolia subsp. alpina can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, allowing for a range of applications and uses.
